creator: zarychtam@plan-b.pwste.edu.pl
text:
It's not a bug but a feature.

The STABLE has to be updated from sources, freebsd-update(8) is a tool to handle RELEASE and sometimes BETA or RC versions.
You can trick freebsd-update(8) with "--currently-running" option to skip this check, but the resulted upgrade can become inconsistent and full of mismerges done by etcupdate(8).

Please consider closing this PR.
